Award points for each completed activity.
gamification_settings.Justera poängvärdena för olika aktivitet: Adjust the point values for different activities.
gamification_settings.Skapa anpassade märken med unika ikoner: Create custom badges with unique icons and descriptions.
gamification_settings.Konfigurera topplistor baserat på poäng,: Configure leaderboards based on points, level, or other metrics.
gamification_settings.Skapa utmaningar för att engagera använd: Create challenges to engage users and encourage learning.
gamification_settings.Definiera utmaningsmål, tidsfrister och: Define challenge goals, deadlines, and rewards.
gamification_settings.Erbjud belöningar för att motivera använ: Offer rewards to motivate users and encourage participation.
gamification_settings.Välj mellan olika typer av belöningar, t: Choose from different types of rewards, such as points, badges, or discounts.
gamification_settings.Skicka meddelanden för att informera anv: Send notifications to inform users about their progress and achievements.
gamification_settings.Anpassa meddelandeinnehållet och frekven: Customize the notification content and frequency.
gamification_settings.Är du säker på att du vill återställa st: Are you sure you want to restore the default settings?
